description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test and smoke using the python:3 Docker image for every job. Define a smoke_test job in the smoke stage that runs on push, merge request, web, or tag events (rules) and executes the following script commands in order: echo "Running smoke tests..."; python3 ./spw.py --help; python3 ./spw.py; python3 ./spw.py 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -1; python3 ./spw.py --single; python3 ./spw.py -E; python3 ./spw.py -E 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -s 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -e 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -b 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -seb 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -seba 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -sebam 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -u 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -l 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -d 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -a 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -v 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -m 20 5; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -r 30 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -rd 30 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -rud 30 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x --min 3 --max 5 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x --min 3 --max 5 --separator '*' 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x --min 4 --max 6 --separator '_' 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x -E 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x -S 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x -O 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x --overwrite 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --sha1 './dict/spw_en#salt1'; python3 ./spw.py --sha1 './dict/spw_en#salt1' 20 1; python3 ./spw.py --sha256 './dict/spw_en#salt2'; python3 ./spw.py --sha256 './dict/spw_en#salt2' 20 1; python3 ./spw.py --sha256 './dict/spw_en#different_salt' 20 1; python3 ./spw.py 1 1; python3 ./spw.py 100 1; python3 ./spw.py 10 100; python3 ./spw.py -ud 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -seba 25 5; python3 ./spw.py -av 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -mavd 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -1 10 20; python3 ./spw.py --single 10 20; python3 ./spw.py -E -seb 20 5; python3 ./spw.py -E -1 20 5; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x -E -S 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x -E --overwrite 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -x -S -O 5 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -r -E 30 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -r -s 30 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -r -seb 30 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -r -u 30 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -r -l 30 3; python3 ./spw.py --dictionary ./dict/spw_small -r -1 30 3; python3 ./spw.py -v; python3 ./spw.py --version. Add a test_all job in the test stage with the same rules that runs: echo "Running all tests..."; make test. Add a test_integration job in the test stage with the same rules that runs: echo "Running integration tests..."; make test-integration. Add a test_security job in the test stage with the same rules that runs: echo "Running security tests..."; make test-security.
